command_binding_id.description: Local command binding identifier within a state.

idempotent.description: Repeated identical command execution has the same intended product-state effect as a single execution.

retryable.description: Explicitly permits automatic command retry. Retryable commands must currently also be idempotent.

authored_value.description: Explicit authored literal-or-binding-expression value used by tests, preconditions, and render example inputs.

binding_expression.description: Shared binding expression using $root.path.to.field syntax. Context-specific compiler validation restricts allowed roots and field paths.

binding_map.description: Map from destination field names to explicit binding values.

binding_value.description: Explicit binding value. Use from for binding expressions and value for literal JSON values.

unconditional.description: Unconditional access-policy rule; the only valid value is true.

value_equals.description: Compares two explicit authorization binding values for equality.

container_id.description: Local Textual layout container identifier within a state.

seed_fixtures.description: Seed fixtures used when resolving this content example.

content_source_ref.description: Content source reference. Text resources use text_resource.* identifiers; media assets use media_asset.* identifiers.

context_bindings.description: Bindings that populate child state-machine context fields.

query_binding_id.description: Local query binding identifier within a state machine or state.

entity_type_display_name.description: PascalCase product/domain type display name stored separately from entity_type_ref.

idempotent.description: Repeated identical external-interface invocation has the same intended product-state effect as a single invocation.

retryable.description: Explicitly permits automatic retry of this external-interface invocation.

feature_tag.description: Unprefixed dotted feature grouping tag; feature tags are labels, not typed references.

html_css_class.description: CSS class identifier used only by generated HTML renderer artifacts.

html_css_declarations.description: CSS declarations for generated HTML artifacts.

html_css_property.description: CSS property name used only in HTML renderer style declarations.

html_css_selector.description: Selector over generated HTML state-machine artifacts: root, slots, regions, command bindings, or child state-machine containers.

html_css_value.description: CSS declaration value used only in HTML renderer style declarations. token.<name> references HTML style tokens.

html_style_contract.description: HTML-only styling contract for generated browser artifacts. Selectors and declarations are interpreted as CSS for HTML rendering only.

local_name.description: Local unprefixed identifier used for named slots, outcomes, rules, roles, render examples, and viewports.

command_outcome.description: Command outcome without embedded domain-event emission metadata.

outcome_name.description: Local command or workflow outcome identifier.

query_result_binding.description: Explicitly binds a query outcome value into named state-machine or view-state data for rendering or later bindings.

region_id.description: Local HTML layout region identifier within a state.

render_example.description: Render example for a state-machine state. Global viewport profiles are applied by tooling; render examples do not reference viewport profiles.

precondition_refs.description: Precondition references used to seed rendered entity_type state for this render example.

render_example_id.description: Local render example identifier within a state.

viewport_profile_item.description: Global audit/golden-image viewport profile. Audit tooling applies declared HTML and Textual viewport sizes globally to eligible state-machine render examples and renderer contracts.

html_viewports.description: Map of viewport identifiers to audit viewport sizes.

textual_viewports.description: Map of viewport identifiers to audit viewport sizes.

schema.description: JSON Schema subset used by the product-spec ontology for payloads, entity types, command/query inputs, context, and reusable schemas.

schema_map.description: Map of field or parameter names to JSON Schema fragments.

local_signal.description: Emitted state-machine-local signal that triggers the sync rule. Data-refresh signals are not sent between child state-machine instances.

slot_binding.description: State-local slot binding. text_slot, asset_slot, and field_slot refer to local slots; command_binding binds a local command binding; literal binds fixed text.

text_slot.description: Local text slot name in the current state.

asset_slot.description: Local asset slot name in the current state.

field_slot.description: Local field slot name in the current state.

slot_name.description: Local slot identifier within a state.

system_under_test_ref.description: Typed reference to the primary resource under test.

textual_style_contract.description: Textual-only styling contract for generated Textual screens and widgets. Selectors and declarations are interpreted as TCSS for Textual rendering only.

textual_tcss_class.description: TCSS class identifier used only by generated Textual widgets.

textual_tcss_declarations.description: TCSS declarations for generated Textual widgets and screens.

textual_tcss_property.description: TCSS property name used only in Textual renderer style declarations.

textual_tcss_selector.description: Selector over generated Textual screens, widgets, containers, command bindings, or child state-machine containers.

textual_tcss_value.description: TCSS declaration value used only in Textual renderer style declarations. token.<name> references Textual style tokens.

workflow_retry_policy.description: Bounded workflow retry policy for activity-result sequence flows targeting a terminal workflow outcome.

state_machine_local_signals.description: State-machine-local signal declarations. Accepted signals may be local signals or data-refresh signals; emitted signals are local signals.

description: Compiler-normalized output schema for the compiled specification file at spec/generated/compiled/spec.yaml. Contains normalized ids, derived domain_events, derived HTML routes, generated references, HTTP operation expansions, and empty collection expansions.

viewport_profiles.description: Canonical global HTML and Textual viewport profiles for audit/golden-image rendering.

title: Compiled-Output Product Spec
